verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can hear it in your voice, I can see it in your eyes It's tearing at your heart, it's weighing on your mind I know the road you're on'cause I've been in your shoes But there's only One who's strong enough to carry you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God's got this, it's in His hands So let go of all the things that you can't understand He knows your fears, He hears your prayers And when you're on your knees you're not alone, He's always there His love is true no matter what it is Whatever you're going through God's got this

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We worry about our kids, we worry about our jobs We worry about the bills that never seem to stop No matter what you've said, no matter what you've done There's no mistake too big for His mercy and His love
